debug_info.goal:
a : Type
x : a
xs : List a
ih : xs = fromRA (Chapter3.toRA a xs)
t : Tree a
ds : List (Digit a)
⊢ x :: (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (Digit.one t :: ds) =
    (concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm)
      (consRA.consT (Tree.leaf x) (List.foldr consRA nilRA ((concat1 ∘ List.map fromRA.frm) (Digit.one t :: ds))))

failed_attempts:
<;> simp_all [concat1, fromRoll]

      <;>

          <;> aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {

          <;> aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [List.bind, List.map]
          <;> aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [List.bind, List.map]
          <;> aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [fromRA, fromRAContract]
          <;> aesop
        })
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [fromRA, fromRAContract]
          <;> aesop

<;> try { aesop }
